game.title: Sekiro™: Shadows Die Twice - GOTY Edition

roadmap.title: Prologue, Ashina Outskirts, and Hirata
roadmap.description: Complete the prologue, learn Resurrection, meet the first Memorial Mob, defeat Gyoubu, and clear the first Hirata memory. Begin collecting every seed, bead, tool component, and skill point rather than postponing early pickups.

roadmap.title: Ashina Castle and the three objective branches
roadmap.description: Defeat Genichiro, Folding Screen Monkeys, Guardian Ape, and the Headless Ape. Collect Gyoubu's Broken Horn and the first-visit Castle Prayer Beads before the ape and monk objectives change the enemy roster.

roadmap.title: Stay loyal and prepare the secret endings
roadmap.description: At Owl, choose “Break the Iron Code, stay loyal to Kuro.” Complete Emma's Purification eavesdropping chain and the Divine Child's Return quest before Divine Dragon, then clear the second Hirata memory and Great Serpent route.

roadmap.title: Fountainhead and the three non-Shura endings
roadmap.description: Finish Fountainhead Palace, all 40 Prayer Beads, nine Gourd Seeds, Demon of Hatred, and the carp quest. After Sword Saint Isshin, back up before Kuro and record Immortal Severance, Purification, and Dragon's Homecoming.

roadmap.title: New Game+ Shura branch
roadmap.description: Continue the same save into New Game+, back up before Owl, obey the Iron Code, and defeat Emma and Isshin Ashina. This records Shura and completes the same-lineage boss aggregate.

roadmap.title: Restore NG+ and finish the grinds
roadmap.description: Restore the pre-Owl NG+ backup, stay loyal, and reach Fountainhead for at least four more Lapis Lazuli. Finish every Prosthetic Upgrade and all 125 Skill Point purchases, then clear any remaining account achievement.

achievements.description: All achievements have been unlocked.
achievements.summary: Unlock the other 33 Steam achievements for Sekiro on the account.

guide.context: This meta-achievement checks the platform achievement set rather than one save file, so ending achievements may come from restored branches as long as Steam recorded each unlock.

steps.text: Complete every other achievement in this guide; @mechanic{Sekiro} unlocks when the final remaining Steam achievement registers.

achievements.description: Defeat all 14 qualifying bosses on one continuous save lineage.
achievements.summary: On one save lineage, defeat Gyoubu, Lady Butterfly, Genichiro, Folding Screen Monkeys, Guardian Ape, Headless Ape, the Ashina Depths Corrupted Monk, Great Shinobi Owl, Owl (Father), the true Corrupted Monk, Divine Dragon, Demon of Hatred, Sword Saint Isshin, and Isshin Ashina.

guide.context: Boss credit carries into New Game+, but separate save slots do not combine. Great Serpent and Great Colored Carp have their own achievements and are not part of this 14-boss counter.

steps.text: During the non-Shura cycle, defeat Gyoubu, Lady Butterfly, Genichiro, Folding Screen Monkeys, Guardian Ape, Headless Ape, and the Ashina Depths Corrupted Monk.
On that same lineage, defeat Great Shinobi Owl, Owl (Father), the true Corrupted Monk, Divine Dragon, Isshin, the Sword Saint, and Demon of Hatred.
Continue that save into New Game+, choose the Shura branch, and defeat @enemy{Isshin Ashina} as the fourteenth qualifying boss.

achievements.description: Traveled to all areas of the game
achievements.summary: Enter all nine major regions: Hirata Estate, Ashina Reservoir, Ashina Outskirts, Ashina Castle, Abandoned Dungeon, Senpou Temple, Ashina Depths, Sunken Valley, and Fountainhead Palace.

guide.context: Only entry into each of the nine major regions is required; activating every Sculptor's Idol is unnecessary. Fountainhead Palace is the sole region excluded by the Shura choice.

steps.text: Enter the eight pre-ending regions through the normal exploration and story routes, including the optional @loc{Hirata Estate} memory.
Choose to stay loyal to Kuro, defeat Great Shinobi Owl and the true Corrupted Monk, and enter @loc{Fountainhead Palace}.

achievements.description: Upgraded all Prosthetic Tools to their limit
achievements.summary: Unlock every node in the Prosthetic Upgrade tree, including all four Lazulite final upgrades, on one save.

guide.context: The complete tree consumes ten Lapis Lazuli, but a non-Shura cycle contains only six and Shura contains none. Restore the pre-Owl NG+ backup, stay loyal to Kuro, and obtain at least four more in Fountainhead Palace.

steps.text: During the first non-Shura cycle, obtain six @item{Lapis Lazuli}: one from Fountainhead's Shichimen Warrior, three through a Pot Noble route, and two from Demon of Hatred.
After earning Shura and Man Without Equal, restore the NG+ pre-Owl backup; answer Owl with @mechanic{Break the Iron Code} so Wolf remains loyal to Kuro.
Reach Fountainhead Palace again and collect at least four more Lapis Lazuli from the Shichimen Warrior and Pot Noble sources.
Farm the remaining Sen and materials, then purchase every connected Prosthetic Upgrade node at the Sculptor.

achievements.description: Purchase every skill in all five skill trees.
achievements.summary: Obtain all five Esoteric Texts and spend 125 total Skill Points on every purchasable skill in the Shinobi, Prosthetic, Ashina, Temple, and Mushin trees.

guide.context: Boss-granted combat arts such as One Mind and Dragon Flash are not required. Experience rewards rise in later New Game cycles, and dying after a partial experience bar loses half of that unbanked progress.

steps.text: Obtain the @item{Shinobi Esoteric Text} from the Sculptor, Prosthetic text after fitting three tools, Ashina text from the Tengu quest, Temple text near Senpou Main Hall, and Mushin text from Tengu or Emma after learning a terminal skill.
Spend Skill Points on every node in all five purchasable skill trees; the complete set costs @mechanic{125 Skill Points}.
If points remain, repeatedly clear a late-game or New Game+ enemy route, return to its Sculptor's Idol, and bank each completed Skill Point before risking death.

achievements.description: Acquired all Prosthetic Tools
achievements.summary: Collect all ten prosthetic components and have the Sculptor fit every component to the Shinobi Prosthetic.

guide.context: Gyoubu's Broken Horn becomes inaccessible after the Divine Dragon world change, so collect the Ashina Reservoir gatehouse component before finishing Fountainhead Palace.

steps.text: Take the @item{Shuriken Wheel} from the building after Outskirts Wall – Gate Path and buy @item{Robert's Firecrackers} from Crow's Bed Memorial Mob for 500 Sen.

In the first Hirata memory, take the @item{Flame Barrel} from the Estate Path bonfire, the @item{Shinobi Axe of the Monkey} from its guarded shrine, and @item{Mist Raven's Feathers} from the hidden Bamboo Thicket pagoda.

Use the Gatehouse Key for @item{Gyoubu's Broken Horn} in Ashina Reservoir, loot @item{Sabimaru} below Upper Tower – Antechamber, and buy @item{Iron Fortress} from Blackhat Badger near Old Grave for 1,600 Sen.
Take the @item{Large Fan} from the Long-arm Centipede Giraffe room and the @item{Slender Finger} from the defeated Guardian Ape.
Return all ten components to the @npc{Sculptor} and choose @mechanic{Fit New Prosthetic Tool} until every base tool is installed.

achievements.description: Acquired all Ninjutsu Techniques
achievements.summary: Acquire @item{Bloodsmoke}, @item{Puppeteer}, and @item{Bestowal} Ninjutsu on one save.

guide.context: The three techniques are fixed boss rewards rather than skill-tree purchases: Genichiro, the Folding Screen Monkeys, and the Headless Ape immortality execution supply them in that order.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Genichiro Ashina} to receive @item{Bloodsmoke Ninjutsu}.
Defeat the @enemy{Folding Screen Monkeys} and meet the Divine Child to receive @item{Puppeteer Ninjutsu}.
Perform the final Mortal Blade execution on the @enemy{Headless Ape} to receive @item{Bestowal Ninjutsu}.

achievements.description: Upgraded Vitality and Posture to their limit
achievements.summary: Collect all 40 @item{Prayer Beads}, then create ten Prayer Necklaces at a Sculptor's Idol to reach 20 Vitality and maximum Posture.

guide.context: Two beads exist only in the second Hirata memory opened by the Purification quest. Castle miniboss rosters change after the ape/monk objectives and again after Divine Dragon, so clear each listed phase before advancing.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 1–5
collectibles.method: Defeat General Naomori Kawarada, the Chained Ogre, General Tenzen Yamauchi, and the Blazing Bull; open the attic chest in the building beyond Gyoubu's battlefield.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 6–8
collectibles.method: Defeat Shinobi Hunter Enshin of Misen and Juzou the Drunkard, then open the hidden-wall chest behind Hirata Audience Chamber.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 9–14
collectibles.method: Defeat General Kuranosuke Matsumoto, Seven Ashina Spears Shikibu, Lone Shadow Longswordman, and Ashina Elite Jinsuke Saze; buy the Dungeon Entrance bead for 1,400 Sen and open the Antechamber hidden-room chest.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 15–17
collectibles.method: Defeat Armored Warrior and Long-arm Centipede Sen'un, then return with Mibu Breathing Technique for the Temple Grounds pond bead.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 18–23
collectibles.method: Defeat Snake Eyes Shirahagi, Tokujiro, and O'Rin; collect the Poison Pool statue-head item, Watermill house attic item, and underwater Mibu Village chest.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 24–27
collectibles.method: Collect the Under-Shrine Valley snow-ledge bead, defeat Snake Eyes Shirafuji and Long-arm Centipede Giraffe, and loot the cave beyond the Giraffe room.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 28–29
collectibles.method: Defeat the Headless Ape and brown mate; the encounter awards two Prayer Beads.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 30–32
collectibles.method: Defeat the lower-tower Chained Ogre, Lone Shadow Masanaga at Great Serpent Shrine, and Lone Shadow Vilehand in the Upper Tower Dojo.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 33–34
collectibles.method: Defeat Lone Shadow Masanaga near Bamboo Thicket Slope and the second-memory Juzou the Drunkard before fighting Owl (Father).

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 35–37
collectibles.method: Defeat the Sakura Bull and Okami Leader Shizu, then open the underwater chest in Fountainhead Lake near Mibu Manor.

collectibles.name: Prayer Beads 38–40
collectibles.method: Defeat Seven Ashina Spears Shume Masaji Oniwa at the Reservoir, Ujinari Mizou below the Dojo, and Shigekichi of the Red Guard beyond Old Grave.

achievements.description: Fully upgraded the "Healing Gourd"
achievements.summary: Give all nine @item{Gourd Seeds} to Emma to raise the Healing Gourd to ten uses.

guide.context: Emma moves from the Dilapidated Temple to Kuro's Room as the story advances. The final seed is in Fountainhead Palace, which is unavailable on a Shura route.

steps.text: Take seeds from General Naomori Kawarada, the building after the Chained Ogre, and the Battlefield Memorial Mob after Gyoubu for 1,000 Sen.
Open the chest beside Upper Tower – Antechamber and buy Fujioka's seed at the Dilapidated Temple for 2,000 Sen after completing his Ashina Castle request.
Collect the Main Hall seed in Senpou Temple, the roofed-platform seed above Under-Shrine Valley, and the seed under the white tree in Mibu Village.
Open the red chest in the building beside the @loc{Palace Grounds} idol for the ninth seed.
Give every @item{Gourd Seed} to @npc{Emma} and accept all nine Healing Gourd upgrades.

achievements.description: Attain the Immortal Severance ending.
achievements.summary: After defeating Isshin, the Sword Saint, give Kuro only @item{Divine Dragon's Tears} to attain Immortal Severance.

guide.context: A backup made after the final boss but before approaching Kuro can be restored for all three non-Shura endings; disable Steam Cloud synchronization before replacing the local save.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Isshin, the Sword Saint}, stop before approaching Kuro, quit normally, and make a safe copy of the Sekiro save folder.
Approach @npc{Kuro} and select @mechanic{Give Dragon's Tears}; do not add Everblossom or Frozen Tears.

achievements.description: Attain the Purification ending.
achievements.summary: After defeating Isshin, the Sword Saint, give Kuro @item{Divine Dragon's Tears} and @item{Everblossom} to attain Purification.

guide.context: Everblossom is the Aromatic Flower dropped by Owl (Father). If the final-choice backup is being used, restore it only after the prior ending achievement appears.

steps.text: Load the pre-choice save made after Isshin, the Sword Saint.
Approach @npc{Kuro} and choose @mechanic{Give Dragon Tears and Everblossom}.

achievements.description: Attain the Dragon's Homecoming ending.
achievements.summary: Finish the Divine Child's Return quest before Divine Dragon; after Sword Saint Isshin, offer Kuro both @item{Divine Dragon's Tears} and @item{Frozen Tears}.

guide.context: The quest uses both serpent viscera and Holy Chapter: Dragon's Return. Frozen Tears must be received before Divine Dragon; the final-choice backup can then supply this ending alongside the other two.

steps.text: At the @loc{Inner Sanctum}, accept and eat Rice from the Divine Child three times, traveling away and back after each serving; when she becomes ill, give her a @item{Persimmon} and receive @item{Rice for Kuro}.
Give @item{Rice for Kuro} to Kuro, travel away and return for his @item{Sweet Rice Ball}, eat it, then report the result to the Divine Child.

Obtain @item{Holy Chapter: Infested} from the Senpou Main Hall priest before Genichiro, or retrieve it later by diving into the Temple Grounds pond after gaining Mibu Breathing Technique; give the chapter to the Divine Child.
Meet the Divine Child in the Hall of Illusion, then search the cave left of Senpou Main Hall and take @item{Holy Chapter: Dragon's Return} from the dead monk near the cave exit; bring it to her.
Use Puppeteer Ninjutsu on Senpou's kite operator, cross the kite to Sunken Valley Cavern, and kill the Great Serpent for @item{Fresh Serpent Viscera}.

From @loc{Bodhisattva Valley}, descend through the poison area to the cave behind Toxic Memorial Mob, use Puppeteer Ninjutsu on the frightened monkey to distract the second serpent, and take @item{Dried Serpent Viscera} from the chamber beyond its head.

Give both serpent viscera to the Divine Child, travel away and return, eavesdrop at her closed door, exhaust Kuro's incense dialogue, then revisit the open Inner Sanctum and receive @item{Frozen Tears} before Divine Dragon.
After Sword Saint Isshin, approach @npc{Kuro} and choose @mechanic{Give Dragon Tears and Frozen Tears}.

achievements.description: Attain the Shura ending.
achievements.summary: Obey Owl's Iron Code and complete the Shura branch by defeating Emma and Isshin Ashina.

guide.context: The ending occurs immediately after the Shura-exclusive boss sequence and prevents Fountainhead Palace in that branch; keep the pre-Owl backup until the achievement appears.

steps.text: After defeating the Guardian Ape and the Ashina Depths Corrupted Monk, return to @loc{Ashina Castle} and climb to Owl on the rooftop.
Answer @npc{Owl} with @mechanic{Obey the Iron Code, forsake Kuro}.
Defeat @enemy{Emma, the Gentle Blade} and then both phases of @enemy{Isshin Ashina} without changing branches.
Allow the final Shura scene and credits to finish until the achievement registers.

achievements.description: Defeat Isshin, the Sword Saint at the end of a non-Shura route.
achievements.summary: At the end of a non-Shura route, defeat Genichiro, Way of Tomoe and all three phases of @enemy{Isshin, the Sword Saint}.

guide.context: The final battle begins in the silvergrass field beyond Ashina Reservoir's Near Secret Passage. Isshin appears immediately after Genichiro's single phase.

steps.text: After Divine Dragon, obtain the @item{Secret Passage Key} from Emma and enter the field beyond @loc{Near Secret Passage}.
Defeat @enemy{Genichiro, Way of Tomoe} without leaving the encounter.
Remove all three health bars from @enemy{Isshin, the Sword Saint} and perform the final execution.

achievements.description: Purchase the final skill in any combat-style branch.
achievements.summary: Purchase the final skill at the end of any one skill-tree branch, such as @mechanic{Ashina Cross} in Ashina Arts.

guide.context: Only one terminal skill is needed here. Ashina Arts is the shortest practical branch, and later enemies award more experience if early farming feels slow.

steps.text: Obtain an Esoteric Text and unlock a skill tree; the @item{Ashina Esoteric Text} comes from the Tengu quest after Gyoubu.
Spend Skill Points along one connected branch and purchase its terminal skill, such as @mechanic{Ashina Cross}.

achievements.description: Purchase one final-tier prosthetic upgrade with Lapis Lazuli.
achievements.summary: Spend Lapis Lazuli and the listed materials on any one final-tier Lazulite prosthetic upgrade.

guide.context: Lazulite Shuriken costs two Lapis Lazuli and is the cheapest final node by Lapis count. No Lapis exists on a Shura route.

steps.text: Obtain at least two @item{Lapis Lazuli} in Fountainhead Palace or from the Demon of Hatred.
At the Sculptor's Prosthetic Upgrade menu, purchase @item{Lazulite Shuriken} or another final-tier Lazulite upgrade.

achievements.description: Received the "Kusabimaru" from Kuro
achievements.summary: Meet @npc{Kuro} in the Moon-view Tower during the prologue and receive @item{Kusabimaru}.

guide.context: This is the first story achievement and occurs before the opening encounter with Genichiro; no optional route or pickup is involved.

steps.text: Follow the prologue route through @loc{Ashina Reservoir} to the @loc{Moon-view Tower}.
Speak with @npc{Kuro} and accept @item{Kusabimaru} when he returns the blade.

achievements.description: Acquired the Shinobi Prosthetic
achievements.summary: Wake at the @loc{Dilapidated Temple} after the prologue and receive the @item{Shinobi Prosthetic} from the Sculptor.

guide.context: The prosthetic is installed automatically after Wolf loses his arm; it becomes the base for every tool needed by later upgrade achievements.

steps.text: Complete the prologue encounter and wake inside the @loc{Dilapidated Temple}.
Finish the opening conversation with the @npc{Sculptor} to receive the @item{Shinobi Prosthetic}.

achievements.description: Encountered the Memorial Mob
achievements.summary: Reach the mountain above @loc{Outskirts Wall – Gate Path} and speak with the @npc{Crow's Bed Memorial Mob} merchant.

guide.context: The merchant is off the main route: the grapple path begins left of the road after General Naomori Kawarada and before the cannon enemy.

steps.text: From @loc{Outskirts Wall – Gate Path}, pass @enemy{General Naomori Kawarada} and take the descending path on the left.
Grapple up the tall mountain before the cannon enemy and speak with the tent merchant at the summit.

achievements.description: Returned from the dead using "Resurrection" for the first time
achievements.summary: After the prologue unlocks Resurrection, die with a resurrection node available and choose @mechanic{Resurrect}.

guide.context: A Sculptor's Idol or enemy deathblows recharge resurrection power. A true death that returns Wolf to an idol does not count unless he first revives on the spot.

steps.text: Rest at a @mechanic{Sculptor's Idol} and confirm that a resurrection node is available.
Let an enemy reduce Wolf's vitality to zero, then choose @mechanic{Resurrect} before returning to an idol.

achievements.description: Defeat Gyoubu Masataka Oniwa at Ashina Castle Gate.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Gyoubu Masataka Oniwa} at the @loc{Ashina Castle Gate} battlefield.

guide.context: Gyoubu is the first mandatory memory boss. Shinobi Firecrackers can frighten his horse, and grappling to his overhead marker closes distance safely.

steps.text: Advance through @loc{Ashina Outskirts} and enter the open battlefield beyond the fortress gate.
Break both of @enemy{Gyoubu Masataka Oniwa}'s deathblow markers and perform the final shinobi execution.

achievements.description: Defeat Lady Butterfly in Hirata Estate.
achievements.summary: Use the Young Lord's Bell Charm to enter @loc{Hirata Estate}, then defeat @enemy{Lady Butterfly} in the Hidden Temple.

guide.context: Lady Butterfly is optional. The old woman in Ashina Outskirts provides the bell, and Owl supplies the Hidden Temple Key during the memory route.

steps.text: Receive the @item{Young Lord's Bell Charm} from the old woman between the first two Outskirts idols and offer it at the Dilapidated Temple Buddha.
Traverse @loc{Hirata Estate}, obtain the @item{Hidden Temple Key} from @npc{Owl}, and open the temple below Hirata Audience Chamber.
Defeat both phases of @enemy{Lady Butterfly} and perform the final deathblow.

achievements.description: Defeat Genichiro Ashina atop Ashina Castle.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Genichiro Ashina} on the roof of @loc{Ashina Castle}.

guide.context: The fight has two Genichiro phases followed by Way of Tomoe. Jump during lightning attacks and attack before landing to return the lightning.

steps.text: Climb the smoke-marker route through @loc{Ashina Castle} to the Upper Tower rooftop.
Clear Genichiro's two normal health bars, then defeat his @enemy{Way of Tomoe} phase.

achievements.description: Defeat the Guardian Ape in Sunken Valley.
achievements.summary: Defeat both phases of the @enemy{Guardian Ape} at @loc{Bodhisattva Valley}.

guide.context: The second phase is an undying, sword-wielding ape. Deflecting its large overhead slash creates an opening for the Loaded Spear to pull the centipede and inflict major posture damage.

steps.text: Cross @loc{Sunken Valley} and the Gun Fort to reach the watering hole beyond @loc{Bodhisattva Valley}.
Remove the Guardian Ape's first health bar, then defeat its headless second phase and perform the execution.

achievements.description: Sever the Headless Ape's immortality with the Mortal Blade.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Headless Ape and its mate in @loc{Ashina Depths}, then use the Mortal Blade deathblow to sever the ape's immortality.

guide.context: This encounter appears in the cavern between Poison Pool and Hidden Forest after the Guardian Ape dies. The final centipede execution also awards Bestowal Ninjutsu.

steps.text: After defeating the Guardian Ape and obtaining the @item{Mortal Blade}, enter the large cavern beyond @loc{Poison Pool}.
Remove the Headless Ape's first health bar, defeat the brown mate that joins it, and finish the Headless Ape.
Approach the fallen ape and perform the additional Mortal Blade deathblow on the exposed centipede.

achievements.description: Catch all four Folding Screen Monkeys.
achievements.summary: Ring the bell in Senpou Temple's Main Hall and catch all four @enemy{Folding Screen Monkeys} in the Hall of Illusion.

guide.context: Each monkey relies on a different sense or escape pattern. The Illusive Hall Bell resets their positions without resetting defeated monkeys.

steps.text: Reach @loc{Senpou Temple Main Hall}, interact with the altar bell, and enter the @loc{Hall of Illusion}.
Track and deathblow the green, purple, orange, and invisible white-robed monkeys.
Return to the Inner Sanctum after the fight to receive Puppeteer Ninjutsu and continue the Mortal Blade objective.

achievements.description: Stay loyal to Kuro and defeat Great Shinobi Owl.
achievements.summary: On Ashina Castle's roof, select @mechanic{Break the Iron Code}; remain loyal to Kuro and defeat @enemy{Great Shinobi Owl}.

guide.context: Owl appears after both the Guardian Ape and the Ashina Depths Corrupted Monk are defeated. Choosing to obey him ends the cycle early and prevents Fountainhead access.

steps.text: Carry both the @item{Shelter Stone} and @item{Lotus of the Palace} back through invaded @loc{Ashina Castle}, then climb to the rooftop.
Answer @npc{Owl} with @mechanic{Break the Iron Code}; this response keeps Wolf loyal to Kuro.
Defeat both health bars of @enemy{Great Shinobi Owl} and perform the final deathblow.

achievements.description: Defeat Owl (Father) in the second Hirata Estate memory.
achievements.summary: Obtain @item{Father's Bell Charm}, enter the second Hirata Estate memory, and defeat @enemy{Owl (Father)} in the Hidden Temple.

guide.context: The eavesdropping chain that produces Father's Bell Charm must be completed before defeating the Divine Dragon. Owl (Father) may be fought later once the memory is unlocked.

steps.text: After Great Shinobi Owl, exhaust Kuro's dialogue, rest, and eavesdrop on @npc{Kuro} from behind the library wall.
Answer @npc{Emma} with @mechanic{I agree}, confirming that Kuro must survive; rest, speak to her again, and meet her at the @loc{Old Grave}.
At the Dilapidated Temple, listen from behind the building while Emma speaks with the Sculptor; confront her afterward to receive @item{Father's Bell Charm}.
Offer the charm at the temple Buddha, reach Hirata's Hidden Temple, and defeat both health bars of @enemy{Owl (Father)}.

achievements.description: Defeat the true Corrupted Monk at Fountainhead Palace.
achievements.summary: Defeat the true @enemy{Corrupted Monk} guarding the entrance to @loc{Fountainhead Palace}.

guide.context: This three-health-bar fight occurs only after staying loyal to Kuro; the earlier purple apparition in Mibu Village is a different encounter.

steps.text: Use the incense route from Kuro's room after defeating Great Shinobi Owl and enter @loc{Fountainhead Palace}.
Break all three health bars of the true @enemy{Corrupted Monk} on the Vermilion Bridge and perform the execution.

achievements.description: Defeat the Divine Dragon and obtain its tears.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Divine Dragon} in Fountainhead Palace and obtain @item{Divine Dragon's Tears}.

guide.context: Starting this boss permanently advances Ashina Castle to its burning endgame state. Finish the Purification and Return quest prerequisites before praying at the Sanctuary.

steps.text: Confirm that @item{Father's Bell Charm} and @item{Frozen Tears} are secured before the Divine Realm prayer.
Reach @loc{Sanctuary} in Fountainhead Palace and pray beside the shrine maiden.
Defeat the Old Dragons and @enemy{Divine Dragon}, then take @item{Divine Dragon's Tears}.

achievements.description: Defeat Isshin Ashina on the Shura route.
achievements.summary: In New Game+, obey Owl at Ashina Castle, then defeat @enemy{Emma, the Gentle Blade} and both phases of @enemy{Isshin Ashina}.

guide.context: This boss exists only on the Shura branch. Back up the continuing save before speaking to Owl so the same NG+ cycle can later be restored for Fountainhead Lapis Lazuli.

steps.text: Reach Owl on the Ashina Castle roof in New Game+ and make a closed-game backup before choosing an answer.
Choose @mechanic{Obey the Iron Code, forsake Kuro} when @npc{Owl} asks for Wolf's loyalty.
Defeat @enemy{Emma, the Gentle Blade}, then remove both health bars from @enemy{Isshin Ashina}.

achievements.description: Defeat the Demon of Hatred in the burning Ashina Outskirts.
achievements.summary: After the Divine Dragon, reach the old Gyoubu battlefield and defeat all three phases of the @enemy{Demon of Hatred}.

guide.context: The route begins near Old Grave and crosses the burning Outskirts to an idol that teleports Wolf into the arena. Malcontent can stagger the demon three times, best saved for phase three.

steps.text: From burning @loc{Ashina Castle}, follow the Old Grave and Outskirts route to the idol beyond Outskirts Wall – Stairway.
Use the idol to travel to the @loc{Flames of Hatred} battlefield.
Remove all three health bars from the @enemy{Demon of Hatred} and perform the final execution.

achievements.description: Kill the Great Serpent with an aerial deathblow.
achievements.summary: Use Puppeteer Ninjutsu to hold Senpou Temple's kite aloft, reach @loc{Sunken Valley Cavern}, and plunge-deathblow the @enemy{Great Serpent}.

guide.context: The kite route becomes usable only after the Folding Screen Monkeys award Puppeteer Ninjutsu. The serpent must also have been driven from the Underbridge Valley encounter.

steps.text: During the first serpent encounter in @loc{Underbridge Valley}, hide inside the abandoned palanquin, deathblow the serpent's eye when prompted, and escape while it recoils.
After leaving the @loc{Gun Fort}, survive the second serpent encounter by crossing the broken rope bridge and swimming between reed cover to the far shore.
Near the first Senpou Temple idol, deathblow the small kite operator and apply @item{Puppeteer Ninjutsu} so the kite remains extended.
Climb the large tree by the temple, grapple across the kite, and follow the cliff route to the @loc{Sunken Valley Cavern} idol.
Walk to the beam above the resting @enemy{Great Serpent}, leap onto its head, and complete both aerial deathblow prompts.

achievements.description: Poison the Great Colored Carp and collect its Great White Whisker.
achievements.summary: Feed the @enemy{Great Colored Carp} Truly Precious Bait, then collect the @item{Great White Whisker} from its body at Guardian Ape's Watering Hole.

guide.context: Either Pot Noble can supply the poisonous bait after enough Treasure Carp Scale business. The achievement triggers from the item beside the corpse, not when the bait is fed.

steps.text: Choose @npc{Pot Noble Koremori} in Fountainhead Palace or @npc{Pot Noble Harunaga} at Hirata Estate, spend @mechanic{7 Treasure Carp Scales} with that merchant, then choose @mechanic{Talk} twice and exhaust the dialogue to receive @item{Truly Precious Bait}.
At Fountainhead Palace's @loc{Feeding Grounds}, ring the bell and feed the Great Colored Carp the Truly Precious Bait.
Travel to @loc{Guardian Ape's Watering Hole} and pick up the @item{Great White Whisker} beside the carp's body.
